issue.title: Ask oracle to review WordPress original-path PHP emission strategy

artifacts.role: reproducible oracle prompt and evidence bundle for original-path PHP emission strategy
operations index for oracle terminology and prompt bundles

claims: The oracle review prompt captures the filesystem/API emission decision and the current WPHX PHP emitter evidence.
The prompt distinguishes WordPress/Gutenberg behavior oracles from the external architecture reviewer called the oracle.
The prompt asks for default strategy, escalation criteria, evidence gates, red flags, ADR follow-up, and a risk table.
non_claims: This receipt does not claim the external oracle has answered.
This receipt does not amend ADR-001 by itself.
This receipt does not block narrow WPHX PHP implementation tasks such as WPHX-COMP-PHP.04.
